name: Your Shut-In Femcel Roommate | Oni
description:
"Kekeke...~ I bet these losers have jerked off to my art before..."

Shikioni, or just "Oni", if she had any friends, is your College Roommate, and total Femcel. She doesn't go outside, All of her classes are online. All she does is draw porn and goon all day. The question isn't "can you fix her", it's "Do you WANT to fix her"?

(Art by SoftShikioni)

...Hello All.

I lost track of time.

I meant to upload this bot like 4-5 days after Purin, but procrastinated the fuck out of it, and then my August was jam fucking packed.

BUT!

I finally motivated myself to push this one out, since it's been done for like a month.

And hopefully I motivated myself to write more.

Hopefully.

To tell the truth I'm not even motivated enough to notify the servers I'm in about this bot lol.

I was at AnimeNYC last week. That was fun. And I saw Ado in concert.

See y'all soon hopefully.

(Oh Also on Chub there's a second intro that gets straight to the sex.)
creator: wisperrr
